channel.title: zip on 码前卒
channel.description: Recent content in zip on 码前卒

item.title: Java建立Zip压缩文件
item.description: 本文是关于实现Java建立Zip压缩文件的代码实例 import java.io.*; import java.util.zip.*; class Zip { public static void main(String[] args) throws IOException { byte[] b = new byte[512]; ZipOutputStream zout = new ZipOutputStream(System.out); for (int i = 0; i < args.length; i++) { InputStream in = new FileInputStream(args[i]); ZipEntry e = new ZipEntry(args[i].replace(File.separatorChar, '/')); zout.putNextEntry(e); int len = 0; while ((len = in.read(b)) != -1) { zout.write(b, 0, len); } zout.closeEntry(); print(e); } zout.close(); } public static void print(ZipEntry e) { PrintStream err = System.
